Once again, going German gaming market: beginning September 2014, ministry interior German federal state Hesse (the competent authority gambling license grants) informed lucky "winners" sports bets licences that were granted September 2014.
hoped that whole tendering process would finally find (happy) ending already lasted about years.
Additionally, request preliminary ruling pending before European Court Justice.
Thus, feared that troubles gaming market will continue.
Time will tell whether limitation licences future whether will abandoned.
German gaming been subject conflicts between private state providers years now, especially with regard sports betting.
long time, state monopoly existed sports bets.
However, 2006 German Federal Constitutional Court 2010 European Court Justice ruled that German gambling sports betting regime force that time infringing German European law.
today, German federal states have agreed State Treaty Gambling which entered into force 2012.
Under this Treaty, sports betting market been opened small extent private providers: providers could apply licence sports betting which would expire June 2019.
Applications were possible until September 2012.
However, requirements such licence grants very strict, e.g.
necessary provide unlimited, directly enforceable bank guarantee ranging between million Euros.
far, two-step application selection procedure gone anything smoothly: first attempt, according Ministry, none applicants made second stage fulfilled requirements licence grant.
second stage procedure repeated.
Moreover, some applicants filed suit during procedure.
September 2014, competent Ministry interior German federal state Hesse informed remaining lucky applicants that they would obtain licence.
planned that after standstill period, final awarding concessions should take place September 2014.
However, unsuccessful applicants that were chosen Ministry Hesse have taken legal steps against this decision.
interim ruling dated September 2014, Administrative Court Wiesbaden stopped procedure altogether prevented final granting licences moment.
Without awarding concessions, there still licensed sport betting providers operating Germany.
Therefore, there still legal uncertainty remaining applicants whether when they will licence.
Also, lengthy concession procedure come end.
fact that decision Administrative Court Wiesbaden interim order only order prevent Ministry Hesse from taking definitive actions, final court decision still pending.
this regard, remains seen Ministry Hesse will appeal against court's decision.
Apart from that, there some more cases unsuccessful applicants pending before other German courts.
Obviously, last word been said about licence grant further developments ongoing concession procedure remain seen.
highly questionable limitation concessions will remain valid future.
answer Parliamentary question, Ministry interior Hesse already indicated that will support abolition limits licence grants (Hesse State Parliament, Printing Matter 19/446 dated July 2014).
Apart from that, District Court Sonthofen asked European Court Justice course preliminary ruling procedure called experimentation clauses sports betting State Treaty Gambling infringes European (District Court Sonthofen, judgement dated 2013, case ref.
17155/11).
would first time that European Court Justice held that German State Treaty Gambling infringes European law.
What consequences advertising those sports betting providers which holding licence?
Concerning this question, besides Section State Treaty Gambling, Advertising Directive ("Werberichtlinie") applies.
this regard, some judgements already exist, which however contradictory.
According State Treaty Gambling, advertising unauthorized gambling allowed.
Therefore, advertising sports betting providers whom licence granted would illegal.
However, contrast their initial administrative practice, competent media authorities longer take actions against private sports betting providers have applied concession already advertise.
Administrative Court Munich held that such practice legal.
Otherwise, private providers would discriminated against compared state gaming providers, since would possible permit advertising because lengthy proceedings which still sight (Administrative Court Munich, judgement dated January 2014, case ref.
11.5502).
contrast, Higher Administrative Court Münster took different view: According court, online advertising sports betting providers prohibited.
fact that concession procedure still running does lead consequence that supervisory authorities have tolerate advertising sports betting (Higher Administrative Court Münster, judgement dated February 2014, case ref.
3027/11).
judgements clearly show that often case German gaming there large regional differences case law.
Therefore, until final decision licence grant made, legal certainty exists sports betting providers have applied concession.
risk that supervisory authorities take legal steps against applicants prohibit advertising sports bets cannot excluded.

MILWAUKEE Brewers have rounded manager Craig Counsell's staff, bringing Steve Karsay bullpen coach work with pitching coach Chris Hook.
Hook promoted from pitching coordinator following seasons Milwaukee's minor league system instructor.
He'll joined Karsay, 11-year major league veteran spent past three seasons pitching coach Triple-A Columbus Cleveland's system.
Karsay worked with Indians starters Michael Clevinger Shane Bieber.
Milwaukee also added Andy Haines hitting coach.
Haines spent season assistant hitting coach Central-rival Chicago Cubs.
Cubs' minor league hitting coordinator from 2016-17.
